the meaning of default=None be wanted","color":"33aa3f","default":true,"description":null},{"id":3941176996,"node_id":"LA_kwDOAAzd1s7q6Zak","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/labels/Meta-issue","name":"Meta-issue","color":"B645AE","default":false,"description":"General issue associated to an identified list of tasks"}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":24,"created_at":"2020-05-20T17:51:44Z","updated_at":"2023-03-28T18:11:16Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"MEMBER","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"Maybe related with #15761.

#### Describe the issue linked to the documentation

I have noticed that when the default is `None` for some parameter or attribute, the meaning is included only in some cases.

For instance, for the `fit` method in the class [`sklearn.tree.DecisionTreeClassifier`](https://scikit-learn.org/stable/modules/generated/sklearn.tree.DecisionTreeClassifier.html#sklearn.tree.DecisionTreeClassifier), `sample_weight=None` is documented as:

> sample_weight : array-like of shape (n_samples,), default=None
> Sample weights. If None, then samples are equally weighted.

However, for the `score` method it is:

> sample_weight : array-like of shape (n_samples,), default=None
> Sample weights.

It is okay like that or should be specified always?","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/issues/17295/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/issues/17295/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/issues/comments/1487388754","html_url":"https://github.com/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/issues/17295#issuecomment-1487388754","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/scikit-learn/scikit-learn/issues/17295","id":1487388754,"node_id":"IC_kwDOAAzd1s5Yp8BS","user":{"login":"Ily83","id":90933947,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjkwOTMzOTQ3","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/90933947?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Ily83","html_url":"https://github.com/Ily83","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Ily83/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Ily83/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Ily83/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Ily83/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Ily83/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Ily83/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Ily83/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Ily83/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Ily83/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2023-03-28T18:11:16Z","updated_at":"2023-03-28T18:11:16Z","author_association":"NONE","body":"working
